reviews.review_description:
“Very early access” but the basis of something potentially great . 
Tighten up the hit boxes . Ie not just a triangle from the mouth to the ground .
Speed up rate of fire and accuracy on guns . More monsters with different hit points . 
A break every so often before you get shoulder cramp . 
Lots of small additions which will make it more appealing. 
But honestly something I’ll play again in not so early access .
